nasb.text: And the Lord opened the mouth of the donkey, and she said to Balaam, “What have I done to you, that you have struck me these three times?”

esv.text: Then the Lord  opened the mouth of the donkey, and she said to Balaam, “What have I done to you, that you have struck me these three times?”

cnv.text: 耶和華開了驢的口，驢就對巴蘭說：“我向你作了甚麼，你竟打我這三次呢？”

ccb.text: 耶和华使驴开口对巴兰说：“我做错了什么，你竟打我三次！”
